description_long: This skateboard features a classic popsicle shape with a slightly concave black deck, designed for optimal control and trick performance. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, likely maple, with a black grippy surface on top for traction. The underside is plain, with no visible graphics or artwork, and the edges reveal the natural wood layers. The skateboard is equipped with four small, light tan wheels, suitable for street or park use, attached to standard silver trucks. The trucks are mounted in a traditional configuration, and the wheels are classic in shape, indicating a focus on versatility and maneuverability. No visible brand logos or decorative elements are present, giving the skateboard a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
description: A minimalist skateboard with a black grippy deck, natural wood edges, classic tan wheels, and standard silver trucks, lacking any visible graphics or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the black deck and two tan wheels partially visible beneath.
description_view_1: Side profile displaying the full length of the black deck, the layered wood edge, and all four tan wheels with silver trucks.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the rounded tail of the black deck and two tan wheels visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, identical to view 1, showing the black deck, wood edge, and all four tan wheels with silver trucks.
attribute_wheel_type: classic, small, tan color, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard silver trucks, traditional mounting, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black grip tape, no visible pattern, graphics, or text
